_comment: Known project slugs the classifier assigns messages to (exactly ONE primary tag per row). It picks the best fit; if nothing fits it may add a new lowercase-kebab slug here (auto-grown). Keep names stable — search filters on them. These are EXAMPLE slugs — replace them with your own projects.

projects.hint: customer quotes, pricing, product questions, order follow-ups
the company's core product/hardware: features, specs, roadmap
on-box/on-prem deployment, servers, boot/autostart, backups, ops
email knowledge-base extraction, contacts DB, follow-up checks
the chat bot itself: gateway, streaming, file ingest, message queue
this searchable chat/message archive and recall system, plus its topic/project classifier — real-time tagging, conversation bursts
invoices, POs, payments, pricing math, accounting
greetings, status checks, meta questions, anything that fits no specific project
